title: Wiren Board service gate
description: A file in /etc/wb-homeui/gates.d/<name>.json; <name> is lowercase latin/digits/hyphen. Apply with `wb-homeui-gates apply`.

externalPort.description: Public gate port. Must differ from internalPort and from the ports of every other gate.

internalPort.description: Port the service listens on at 127.0.0.1.

role.description: Minimal role, hierarchical (user < operator < admin); user admits any logged-in account.

auth.description: false — no authorization: plain proxy, trusted X-WB-* headers still stripped.

menu.description: Menu entry in homeui; omit to keep the gate out of the menu.

title.description: Menu item labels; a single language is enough — it is shown for both.
